name: Pegg's Oven Roast Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the roast to room temperature.
2. Preheat oven to 450°F (232°C).
3. Roast for 1 hour.
4. Turn off the oven and leave it closed for about 5 hours, without opening the door.
5. About 30 minutes before serving, turn on the oven if desired to warm it up slightly. The roast turns out just as preferred - not overdone and with some good edges for those who prefer well-done.
This is how I cook almost any roast, and it turns out delicious!
